title: Income Tax (Foreign Personnel) (Approval and Exemption) Order, 2011

sections.heading: With respect to the Agreement described in the Schedule, Approval of
sections.text:
foreign
any income received by the expatriate staff of China-Africa
personnel
Development Fund in Zambia is hereby approved for the purpose
of exemption from tax.

sections.heading: The emoluments payable to any foreign employee temporarily Exemption
sections.text:
employed in the Republic of Zambia by the organisation approved from tax
in paragraph 2 shall be exempt from tax pursuant to subparagraph
(c) of paragraph 3 of Part II of the Second Schedule to the Act.
SCHEDULE
(Paragraph 2)
AOREl!MENT
The Memorandum of Understanding between the China-Africa Development
Fund and the Government of the Republic of Zambia dated 10th, January, 2011
regarding the establishment of the regional representative office of China-Africa
Development Fund.
DR. S. MUSOKOTWANE,
LUSAKA Minister of Finance and
II th April, 2011 National Planning
